internships.title: Frontend Developer Intern
internships.description: Join our frontend team to build responsive and modern web applications using React. You'll work with experienced developers and contribute to real projects.
internships.requirements: Basic knowledge of React, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript

internships.title: Business Analyst
internships.description: Analyze business processes and data to provide insights. Work with our analytics team on real-world projects.
internships.requirements: Knowledge of SQL, Excel, and data analysis

internships.title: UI/UX Design
internships.description: Create beautiful and user-friendly interfaces for mobile and web applications. Collaborate with our design team.
internships.requirements: Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD, UI/UX design principles

internships.title: Backend Developer Intern
internships.description: Develop robust backend systems and APIs. Work with modern tech stack and grow your skills in backend development.
internships.requirements: Knowledge of Node.js, databases, and REST APIs

internships.title: Marketing Analyst
internships.description: Support marketing campaigns and analyze their effectiveness. Learn about digital marketing strategies.
internships.requirements: Interest in marketing, basic analytics knowledge
